column2: #| fig-alt: A scatterplot graph showing the number of settled stars over time in days for each substrate treatment. Each day is plotted with a dot and a smoothed line was added to show the linear regression over time. The treatments are labeled on the legend (control, rhodomonas only, sterilized sea grapes, and non-sterilized sea grapes). The sea grape treatments show a much faster settlement rate over the experiment.
ggplot(aes(x = Day, y = Settled, color = Treatment)) +
labs(title = "Number of settled larvae over time",
